ConEco - Frequently Asked Questions

← Back to Home

ConEco is a unified platform that connects customers with construction material vendors and service providers in one place.

You can register by clicking on the Register button and selecting your role (Customer/Vendor).

Yes, all vendors go through a quality control (QC) verification process before being listed on the platform.

Browse products/services, add them to your cart, and proceed to checkout.

Yes, you can track your orders from the "My Orders" section in your dashboard.
